summary: Full backend + frontend regression for Thynk IT marketing site. All 8 backend pytest tests passed against the public preview URL. Frontend verified end-to-end: 9 services rendered (incl. GSEO/Workflow/AI Agents), 'Nine disciplines.' title, 2 founder cards + horizontal scrollable team-strip with 8 team cards (scroll verified), Contact email & Footer show ethonislam00@gmail.com, contact form submission persists lead in DB via /api/leads, all 9 service options + 'Multiple / Not sure' present in the dropdown, /work page renders Sopee AI / Escape Bags / Rico / Broodchic / Eros / Taqneo with logo images.
critical_code_review_comments: Hardcoded fallback email 'ethonislam00@gmail.com' in backend/_send_lead_notification — consistent with task requirement, but consider making LEAD_NOTIFY_EMAIL strictly required in prod env to fail loud if misconfigured.
SMTP credentials silently skipped is documented as intentional (dev). Add a startup-log warning so prod deployments don't accidentally ship without SMTP set.

Frontend Contact.jsx duplicates SERVICES list inline instead of importing from /data/site.js — risk of drift if service titles ever change. Recommend importing SERVICES.map(s=>s.title) and appending 'Multiple / Not sure'.
Footer.jsx newsletter form does not validate already-subscribed state to the user (backend is idempotent so this is cosmetic).
No backend rate-limiting / captcha on /api/leads — public endpoint is open to spam. Add throttling before production.
test_credentials: None — no auth in this app.
seed_data_creation: Created ~5 TEST_/playwright_* lead rows + 1 newsletter subscriber in MongoDB during testing. All are clearly prefixed and harmless for the marketing site.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend public URL = REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. SMTP is intentionally empty (per task) — leads still 200 and persist. team-strip uses data-testid=team-strip with team-card-0..7. Service dropdown uses data-testid=contact-input-service (native <select>). Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_thynkit_api.py -v.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. All 11 review-request items pass.
